# WZRD — AI Model Velocity Oracle

> Which models are gaining attention right now? WZRD measures real-time developer adoption across HuggingFace, GitHub, OpenRouter, and ArtificialAnalysis. 100+ models tracked. Free, neutral, on-chain.

## Read the Oracle

GET https://api.twzrd.xyz/v1/signals/momentum

Returns: model, trend, score, action, confidence, platform, capabilities.

Filters: ?limit=N, ?platform=huggingface, ?trending=true, ?capability=code

## Read (free, zero config)

```python
pip install wzrd-client

import wzrd
model = wzrd.pick("code")              # → "Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B"
top = wzrd.shortlist("reasoning", n=3) # ranked list
```

No API key. No account. Works immediately.

## Earn CCM (requires Solana keypair)

Agents that report verified inference earn CCM tokens. The MCP read tools are the discovery surface. Earning runs in your agent's runtime:

```python
wzrd.run_loop(keypair_path="~/.solana/id.json")
# authenticates → picks models → runs inference → reports → claims CCM
```

## On-Chain Feeds (Solana) — Verify Yourself

9 Switchboard pull oracle feeds on mainnet (7 velocity + 2 price). Any Solana program can read model velocity.

Sample feeds (quote accounts — query with `solana account <address>`):
- Qwen 3.5 9B:          AepiFwnbfCvXwA5gtAysMaxoqdwsGiYCN6gFBLGqZf1S
- Llama 3.3 70B:         6EgRwhE6db1Aqsxzmp9wj6QH2y5ZEji1xe1YdovwmD9g
- Kimi K2.5:             5xmwRtTgcCz6R2KapxpEXVjCNcZCpe24DnCC295S769w
- Qwen3-Coder-Next:      g3RRSmg4PJjDNCq3jkTutMB8431UMMtRTNBRpc7UfVV

All 7 velocity + 2 price feeds listed in the keeper source: https://github.com/twzrd-sol/wzrd-final/blob/main/keepers/switchboard-velocity/src/keeper.ts

## MCP Server (26 tools + 2 resources)

POST https://app.twzrd.xyz/api/mcp
GET https://app.twzrd.xyz/api/mcp (Accept: text/event-stream)

Resources: `wzrd://leaderboard`, `wzrd://health`

Streamable HTTP MCP — connect from Claude, Hermes Agent, or any MCP client.
Agent earn flow: `agent_challenge` -> `agent_verify` -> `infer` -> `report_outcome` -> `get_rewards_balance`.

## Links

- Oracle Feed: https://api.twzrd.xyz/v1/signals/momentum
- OpenAPI (public subset): https://twzrd.xyz/openapi.json
- OpenAPI (full API): https://api.twzrd.xyz/openapi.json
- MCP Guide: https://twzrd.xyz/mcp-guide.md
- MCP Manifest: https://twzrd.xyz/.well-known/mcp-server.json
- MCP Endpoint: https://app.twzrd.xyz/api/mcp
- Agent Manifest: https://twzrd.xyz/.well-known/agent.json
- Health: https://api.twzrd.xyz/health
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/wzrd-client/
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wzrd_sol/sdk
